economic_notes: Nation holds 99.99% interest in Xat'sull Limited Partnership (reported revenues $1,724,011, expenses $842,617). Holds 50% interest in Likely Xat'Sull Community Forest Ltd. Holds 51% interest in Xat'Sull T'micw Resources LLP. Also holds investments in Xat'sull Logging Ltd and Xat'sull Development Ltd. Nation operates a ranch with livestock inventory.
notes: Financial statements prepared under Canadian public sector accounting standards (PSAB). Other income includes equity income in investments of $935,527 (prior year $3,192,766) and tangible capital asset acquisitions of $975,964 (prior year $1,251,530). The detailed revenue and expense schedules (pages 19-20) were not included in the provided images, so individual revenue/expense line breakdowns and ISC/government transfer amounts could not be extracted. The nation uses fund accounting with Operations, Capital, Enterprise, Trust, CMHC Social Housing, and Treaty Self-Government funds all consolidated. No long-term debt reported in 2023. Accounts payable includes due to related party of $135,400.
